frontmatter.description: Runtime configuration has diverged from what is committed in the repo

signature.embedding_seed: config drift runtime mismatch env vars stale

body:
## When this fires
The live runtime config (env vars, feature flags, secrets) does not match the version in the repo. Common causes: a manual hotfix that bypassed CI, a stale environment that missed a deploy, or rotated secrets that diverged across regions.

## Playbook
1. Read live-config-snapshot to capture the current state.
2. Compare against config-diff for what the repo expects.
3. Cross-check secret-rotation-audit for any recent out-of-band changes.
